criteria.text_raw: Minimum annual turnover of Rs. 5 Crore in any of the last 3 financial years.
At least 3 similar projects successfully completed in the last 5 years.
Valid GST registration is mandatory for participation.
ISO 9001 certification is desirable for technical scoring.

ocr.text: ACME Infrastructure Pvt Ltd. Total Turnover (audited FY 2023-24): Rs. 5.23 Crore. GSTIN: 27AAAAA1234A1Z5 active under Central Goods and Services Tax. ISO 9001 certification held for civil construction. We have completed 4 similar projects in road and building works in the last 5 years.

Beta Constructors LLP. CA certificate: total turnover Rs. 5.23 Crore for FY 2023-24. ITR excerpt: total turnover from business INR 3,10,00,000 (Rupees Three Crore Ten Lakh only). GSTIN 06BBBBB5678B2Z3 is active. GST registration is submitted for eligibility.
